title: Module 1
content:
Introduction: Scope and functions of Industrial Engineering - Types of
production (batch, flow and unit), Roles of line supervisors and production
managers.
Product Development and Design: Objectives - Quality and cost considerations -
Human factors in design - Detailed design & prototyping - Functionality &
manufacturability - Standardization, simplification and variety reduction -
Concurrent engineering.
Plant layout and Material handling: Types of plant layout - Principles of material
handling - Material handling equipment – Types, selection and application.

title: Module 2
content:
Production Planning and Control: Aggregate production planning, materials
requirement planning - Inventory Management: EOQ models, discount models,
P system, Q system, reorder level – Selective inventory control techniques - JIT -
Supply chain and management.
Break down, preventive and predictive maintenance.

title: Module 3
content:
Lean Manufacturing (LM): Basic elements – Tools - Concept of wastes - stages
of 5S and waste elimination - Need for LM.
Agile manufacturing: Definition, business need, conceptual frame work,
characteristics and generic features - Approaches to enhance agility in
manufacturing - Managing people in agile organization.
Enterprise resource planning (ERP): Concept of Enterprise, ERP Overview -
Integrated information system - ERP implementation – Benefits, challenges,
success and failure factors - Business Process Reengineering (BPR), Customer
relationship management (CRM).

title: Module 4
content:
Quality Management: Quality, quality planning, quality control, quality
assurance, quality management – TQM, ISO, Six Sigma and Quality circle (Brief
description only).
Statistical Quality Control - Process capability - Causes of variation in quality-
Control charts for  and R – Acceptance sampling.
Reliability Engineering - Causes of failures - Bath tub curve - System reliability
- Life testing.
